# NLIST B.V.

NLIST B.V. is a Staffing and Recruiting company. NLIST is a specialist group that recruits international professionals and provides services in finding talented technicians abroad with experience and expertise. They focus on candidates who have reached vocational, bachelor, or master levels in their education and specialize in engineering, maintenance, and it. They assist candidates in securing challenging positions with leading dutch clients and establishing a life in the netherlands. NLIST B.V. employs 22 people (+28.6% YoY, +6 people), founded in 2018.
